table-593-593.caption: What are the cost and treatment type description of each treatment?
data: Aids recovery from muscle and joint injuries.
Restores tooth integrity after decay or damage.
Surgical removal of the appendix to treat appendicitis.
Uses magnetic fields to create detailed images of organs and tissues.
Drug treatment designed to destroy or slow the growth of cancer cells.
